name: Plexyfin
overview: Plugin for Jellyfin that syncs collections and artwork from Plex to Jellyfin
description: Syncs collections, artwork, and their metadata from your Plex Media Server to Jellyfin.
changelog:
- Skip re-downloading artwork that hasn't changed in Plex (compares Plex updatedAt against local file), with a Force Replace All Artwork override
- Add configurable concurrency limit (MaxConcurrentApiRequests, default 3) to prevent flooding Plex and Jellyfin during artwork sync
- Process artwork in real batches with a configurable pause between batches
- Bound previously unlimited parallelism for season and episode artwork sync
- Request external IDs (includeGuids) from Plex for more reliable item matching
- Enable nullable reference types and clean up build warnings
